nasb.text: And Abimelech said, “I do not know who has done this thing; you did not tell me, nor did I hear of it until today.”

esv.text: Abimelech said, “I do not know who has done this thing; you did not tell me, and I have not heard of it until today.”

cnv.text: 亞比米勒說：“誰作了這事，我不知道，你也沒有告訴我；我現在才聽見。”

ccb.text: 亚比米勒说：“我不知道是谁做的，你以前没有告诉我，我今天才听说这事。”

csbs.text: 亚比米勒说：“我不知道谁做了这事，你也没有告诉过我，我今天才听到。”
